title: Welfare to Work Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Employment > Welfare to Work Programs 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides job training, individualized career and life coaching, personal finance and life skills education, job placement, and work experience opportunities. Works with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) program. Also provides job placement and support for ex-offenders in addition to a welfare to work program. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 887-8495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF MULTNOMAH COUNTY EAST JOBS OFFICE, CHILD WELFARE, SELF-SUFFICIENCY, FAMILY STABILITY AND EMPLOYMENT, AND TEEN PARENT SELF-SUFFICIENCY JOBS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Steps to Success, a partnership between ODHS and Portland Community College, is an integrated program that provides individuals with the tools to become self-sufficient. This program provides intensive assistance, job search skills and training, assistance to receive a GED or ABE, counseling services, alcohol/drug programs, and employment services. JOBS is the state's employment and training program for people receiving public assistance. One segment of the JOBS program, known as JOBS Plus, places TANF recipients in limited-duration training positions with private employers. 11826 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (971) 673-0909 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF MULTNOMAH COUNTY GRESHAM SELF-SUFFICIENCY JOBS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF JOBS is the state's employment and training program for people receiving public assistance. One segment of the JOBS program, known as JOBS Plus, places TANF recipients in limited-duration training positions with private employers. 635 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 102 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (503) 673-8500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF MULTNOMAH COUNTY JOBS PROGRAM OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF MULTNOMAH COUNTY JOBS PROGRAM
